briefdescription.para: signal about Iso-surface changes (from updateIsoSurface)
triggered by changes to voxels data
means defaultSerializeVoxelsFormat()

detaileddescription.para: Service data

briefdescription.para: scale object size (all point positions)
Returns iso surface, empty if iso value is not set.
Return VdbVolume.
Returns Float grid which contains voxels data, see more on openvdb::FloatGrid.

detaileddescription.para: does the object have any model available (but possibly empty), e.g. ObjectMesh has valid mesh() or ObjectPoints has valid pointCloud()

briefdescription.para: Returns dimensions of voxel objects.
Returns current iso value.
Returns histogram.
return several info lines that can better describe the object in the UI

memberdef.argsstring: (const SimpleVolume &simpleVolume, const std::optional< Vector2f > &minmax={}, ProgressCallback cb={}, bool normalPlusGrad=false)
memberdef.name: construct

detaileddescription.para:
Clears all internal data and then creates grid and calculates histogram (surface is not built, call updateHistogramAndSurface)
normalPlusGrad
true means that iso-surface normals will be along gradient, false means opposite direction
minmax
optional data about known min and max values set a new background for the VdbVolume, if normalPlusGrad = true, use the maximum value, otherwise the minimum value

Clears all internal data and then creates grid and calculates histogram (surface is not built, call updateHistogramAndSurface)
normalPlusGrad
true means that iso-surface normals will be along gradient, false means opposite direction set a new background for the VdbVolume, if normalPlusGrad = true, use the maximum value, otherwise the minimum value

memberdef.argsstring: (const FloatGrid &grid, const Vector3f &voxelSize, const std::optional< Vector2f > &minmax={})
memberdef.name: construct

detaileddescription.para:
Clears all internal data and then remembers grid and calculates histogram (surface is not built, call updateHistogramAndSurface)
minmax
optional data about known min and max values

briefdescription.para: Clears all internal data and then creates grid and calculates histogram (surface is not built, call updateHistogramAndSurface)

detaileddescription.para: Updates histogram, by stored grid (evals min and max values from grid) rebuild iso surface if it is present
Sets iso value and updates iso-surfaces if needed: Returns true if iso-value was updated, false - otherwise
Sets external surface mesh for this object and returns back previous mesh of this
Sets external vdb volume for this object and returns back previous vdb volume of this
Sets external histogram for this object and returns back previous histogram of this

briefdescription.para: Calculates and return new mesh or error message.

memberdef.argsstring: (const VdbVolume &volume, float iso, ProgressCallback cb={}) const
memberdef.name: recalculateIsoSurface

briefdescription.para: Same as above, but takes external volume.
Calculates and returns new histogram.
returns true if the iso-surface is built using Dual Marching Cubes algorithm or false if using Standard Marching Cubes
set voxel point positioner for Marching Cubes (only for Standard Marching Cubes)

detaileddescription.para: Sets active bounds for some simplifications (max excluded) active bounds is box in voxel coordinates, note that voxels under (0,0,0) and voxels over (dimensions) are empty NOTE: don't forget to call invalidateActiveBoundsCaches if you call this function from progress bar thread
Returns active bounds (max excluded) active bounds is box in voxel coordinates, note that voxels under (0,0,0) and voxels over (dimensions) are empty

briefdescription.para: Call this function in main thread post processing if you call setActiveBounds from progress bar thread.
get active (visible) voxels
set active (visible) voxels (using only in Volume Rendering mode)

detaileddescription.para: VoxelId is numerical representation of voxel Coordinate is {x,y,z} indices of voxels in box (base dimensions space, NOT active dimensions) Point is local space coordinate of point in scene

briefdescription.para: Returns indexer with more options.

detaileddescription.para: prepare data for volume rendering returns false if canceled or voxel data is empty

this function should only be called from GUI thread because it changes rendering object, it can take some time to prepare data, so you can prepare data with progress callback by calling prepareDataForVolumeRendering(cb) function before calling this one

briefdescription.para: move volume rendering data to caller: basically used in RenderVolumeObject
mesh object can be seen if the mesh has at least one edge
sets top limit on the number of vertices in the iso-surface
gets top limit on the number of vertices in the iso-surface

detaileddescription.para: clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object

sets some dirty flags for the object (to force its visual update)
mask
is a union of DirtyFlags flags
invalidateCaches
whether to automatically invalidate model caches (pass false here if you manually update the caches)

briefdescription.para: returns cached information about the number of active voxels

simplesect.para: this ctor is public only for std::make_shared used inside clone()

briefdescription.para: returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap
returns overriden file extension used to serialize voxels inside this object, nullptr means defaultSerializeVoxelsFormat()

detaileddescription.para: overrides file extension used to serialize voxels inside this object: must start from '.', nullptr means serialize in defaultSerializeVoxelsFormat()

briefdescription.para: reset basic object colors to their default values from the current theme
this is private function to set default colors of this type (ObjectVoxels) in constructor only
set default scene-related properties
swaps this object with other

detaileddescription.para: swaps signals, used in swap function to return back signals after swapBase_ pls call Parent::swapSignals_ first when overriding this function

Write parameters to given Json::Value,
if you override this method, please call Base::serializeFields_(root) in the beginning

Reads parameters from json value
if you override this method, please call Base::deserializeFields_(root) in the beginning

briefdescription.para: Reads model from file.

memberdef.definition: virtual MRVOXELS_API Expected< std::future< Expected< void > > > MR::ObjectVoxels::serializeModel_
memberdef.name: serializeModel_

detaileddescription.para: Creates future to save object model (e.g. mesh) in given file path is full filename without extension
This class stores information about voxels object
